'''âz-v-l-t''' ('''kazavletoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:velarize|velarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:velarize|velarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-v-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazavletoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizavletoko|thizavletoko]] || [[word:jizavletoko|jizavletoko]] || [[word:shizavletoko|shizavletoko]] || [[word:kizavletoko|kizavletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzavletoko|thuthuzavletoko]] || [[word:jujuzavletoko|jujuzavletoko]] || [[word:shushuzavletoko|shushuzavletoko]] || [[word:kukuzavletoko|kukuzavletoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozavletoko|thozavletoko]] || [[word:jozavletoko|jozavletoko]] || [[word:shozavletoko|shozavletoko]] || [[word:kozavletoko|kozavletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzavletoko|thĂŠzavletoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzavletoko|jĂŠzavletoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzavletoko|shĂŠzavletoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzavletoko|kĂŠzavletoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazavletoko|thazavletoko]] || [[word:jazavletoko|jazavletoko]] || [[word:shazavletoko|shazavletoko]] || [[word:kazavletoko|kazavletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazavletoko|thazavletoko]] || [[word:jazavletoko|jazavletoko]] || [[word:shazavletoko|shazavletoko]] || [[word:kazavletoko|kazavletoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
